pkgmetadata.longdescription: As of 2026-04-23 the upstream GitHub repository (github.com/newville/ifeffit) has been deleted; the remote-id below is recorded for historical reference only and does not resolve. The author's maintained successor is Larch, packaged as sci-physics/xraylarch. This ebuild is masked in profiles/package.mask; it remains in the tree as a revival target (e.g. if a usable fork surfaces or a local Fortran build is still needed by sci-physics/demeter).
